hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: Aluna Tam Coc Hotel in Ninh Binh offers family rooms with air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and city views. Each room includes a balcony, wardrobe, and free toiletries.
Exceptional Facilities: Guests can enjoy a restaurant, year-round outdoor swimming pool, and free WiFi. Additional amenities include a hot tub, lift, 24-hour front desk, bike hire, and room service.
Local Attractions: Tam Coc Cave is less than 1 km away, while Bich Dong Pagoda lies 1.9 km from the hotel. Other nearby points include Thung Nham Bird Park Ecotourism (5 km) and Ninh Binh Stadium (9 km).
Accessibility: The Tho Xuan Airport is 78 km from the hotel.

hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: Tam Coc Mountain Ecolodge in Ninh Binh offers family rooms with mountain views, private bathrooms, and modern amenities. Each room includes air-conditioning, a minibar, and free WiFi.
Relaxing Facilities: Guests can enjoy a spa and wellness centre, swimming pool with a view, sun terrace, and lush garden. Additional amenities include a hot tub, sauna, and outdoor seating areas.
Dining Experience: The traditional restaurant serves Asian cuisine with vegetarian, vegan, and gluten-free options. Breakfast includes juice and fruits, while lunch and dinner feature a variety of dishes.
Local Attractions: Tam Coc Cave is a 13-minute walk away, while Thung Nham Bird Park Ecotourism lies 6 km from the lodge.

hotels.description_en:
Elegant Accommodation: Tam C谩禄鈥榗 Valley Eco Resort in Ninh Binh offers a 4-star hotel experience with a swimming pool boasting stunning views, a lush garden, and a terrace. Guests can relax in the outdoor seating area or enjoy the picnic spots.
Comfortable Amenities: The resort provides free WiFi, air-conditioning, and private check-in and check-out services. Additional facilities include a 24-hour front desk, room service, and a tour desk. Free bicycles are available for exploring the surrounding area.
Dining Options: A variety of breakfast options are offered, including American, buffet, vegetarian, vegan, halal, and Asian. Breakfast includes juice, pancakes, and fruits. The on-site restaurant and bar serve a range of delicious meals and beverages.
